title: Turi's Cookbook
description:
Turi's Cookbook is a Mod that Adds a variety of Foods to Minecraft.
More Foods will be Added in Future Updates.
body:
Turi's Cookbook Adds a Large Variety of Foods and Ingredients!
The purpose of this mod was to add more foods and recipes that adds on to both vanilla food items and new ones.

This Includes:
-76 Different Food Items
-9 Ingredients
-3 Crops
-2 Mobs
-1 Workstation
-1 Tool
-3 Villager Trades

Some of the recipes give use to items that are normally essentially useless in minecraft in terms of recipes/use, like Chicken Eggs now being able to be used for Fried Eggs, and is now one of the most used ingredients for certain food.

Certain food items aren't necessary for survival, but can be used as a fun food item for friends or just for yourself!
That Includes things like Mustard and ketchup, which are used for things likes Burgers and Hotdogs.

It's Important to note that this Mod also brings a brand new Tree Type to the Savannah Biome!
The Mustard tree is exactly how it sounds. you may harvest the leaves with a Hoe for Mustard seeds, and you may turn them into Mustard with a Bottle of Water in a Crafting Table!

The Mod also adds a brand new Workstation called the Cutting Board which is probably one of the most useful items in the mod for food.
You must Insert your Cuttable Food/Ingredient in Slot 1, and then a Knife in Slot 2, then Click Cut!

You can use it to cut Things like raw food for ingredients, Eggs to crack them, or even Finished meals to cut them up and share pieces with friends!

A lot more features to Come in Future Updates!
